name: Crispy Chicken Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lbs Chicken breasts (skinless, boneless, cut into 1 inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 inch of oil in a frying pan or deep fryer to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, mix together milk and the flour, Parmesan cheese, Paprika, Oregano, and mustard in a paper bag.
3. Dip chicken pieces first in milk, then coat with the mixture by placing about a dozen pieces at a time into the bag and shaking.
4. Fry chicken in batches without crowding, turning occasionally for about 5 minutes, until crispy and golden brown. Drain on paper towels. Serve hot.
